reference: I had an attack today, during which I could not swallow very well; it felt as if something were stuck in my esophagus. I started hiccuping and then began vomiting up whitish foam. I was at a store and went to the bathroom there; I continued to spit up. I left and returned to work, and immediately threw up whitish foam. Is it an allergic reaction of some sort? I was in Costco and sampled the food—nothing particularly unusual. Any ideas?
